raw_block:
–1. The mother of JesusMt 1:16;Lu 1:26-38;2:5-19
  .Visits her cousin, ElisabethLu 1:39-56
  .Attends the feast at Jerusalem with her husband and her son, 
starts back on the return, misses Jesus, seeks and finds him in the temple areaLu 2:48-51
  .Is present with Jesus at a marriage feast in Cana of GalileeJoh 2:1-10
  .Seeks Jesus when he is teaching in a houseMt 12:46,47;Mr 3:31;Lu 8:19
  .Present at the crossJoh 19:25-27
  .Is committed to the care of JohnJoh 19:27
  .Lives with the disciples in JerusalemAc 1:14
  .Prophecies concerningIsa 7:14;Lu 2:35
–2. Magdalene
  .Possessed of devils, delivered by JesusMr 16:9;Lu 
8:2,3
  .Present at the crucifixionMt 27:56;Mr 15:40;Joh 
20:1,11-13
  .Recognizes Jesus after the resurrectionMt 28:8-10;Mr 16:9;Joh 20:14-18
–3. Sister of Mary the mother of Jesus, and wife of CleophasJoh 19:25
  .Mother of James and JosesMt 27:56;Mr 15:40;Joh 19:25
  .At the gravesite of JesusMt 27:61;Mr 15:47
  .Assists in preparing the corpse of Jesus for burial
